Until now, the disciples had been united; this had often been noted to their credit; but as they increased in number, they began to complain. The word of God was sufficient to occupy all the thoughts, cares, and time of the apostles. Those chosen to serve tables must be properly qualified. They must be filled with gifts and graces of the Holy Ghost, necessary for rightly managing this responsibility; men of truth, and hating greed. All who are employed in the service of the church ought to be commended to God’s grace by the prayers of the church. They blessed them in the name of the Lord. The word and grace of God are greatly magnified when those are affected by it who were least likely.

When they could not answer Stephen's arguments as a debater, they prosecuted him as a criminal and brought false witnesses against him. It is almost a miracle of providence that so few religious people have been murdered in the world through perjury and false claims of legal authority, when so many thousands hate them and feel no guilt about lying under oath. Wisdom and holiness make a person’s face shine, but will not protect them from being treated poorly. What can we say of humankind, a rational being, yet attempting to maintain a religious system by false witness and murder! This has happened countless times. But the blame does not rest so much upon understanding as it does upon the heart of a fallen creature, which is deceitful above all things and desperately wicked. Yet the Lord’s servant, possessing a clear conscience, cheerful hope, and divine comfort, may smile in the midst of danger and death.
